file_insights: Created connectivity_provider.dart (247 lines): Implements Riverpod StateNotifier for connectivity state management
Created connectivity_provider_test.dart: Unit tests for connectivity provider functionality
Updated offline_providers.dart to export connectivity provider and its variants
Updated auto-claude progress tracking files to mark subtask 3.2 as completed
Implementation includes multiple provider variants for different use cases (full state, boolean status, connection type, inverted status)
patterns_discovered: Riverpod StateNotifier pattern with autoDispose lifecycle management
Provider variant pattern (connectivityProvider, isConnectedProvider, connectionTypeProvider, isOfflineProvider)
Selector pattern for derived state (isConnected getter via isConnectedProvider)
Stream-based integration with domain services (subscribes to ConnectivityService)
Auto-dispose pattern using ref.onDispose for cleanup
UI-friendly helper methods for common connectivity checks
gotchas_discovered: Proper stream subscription lifecycle management to prevent memory leaks
Handling of initial connectivity state and error fallbacks
Integration between domain service layer and presentation provider layer
Provider naming conventions and export organization
AutoDispose behavior and its implications for state persistence
Error handling when connectivity service becomes unavailable

approach_outcome.approach_used: Implemented Riverpod StateNotifier provider that subscribes to ConnectivityService stream, manages connectivity state reactively, and provides multiple provider variants for different UI needs
approach_outcome.why_it_worked: Followed established Riverpod patterns from existing providers, properly implemented stream lifecycle management, created comprehensive provider variants, included proper error handling, and used autoDispose for automatic cleanup

recommendations: Add integration tests to verify connectivity provider interaction with ConnectivityService
Implement UI components that consume connectivity providers for real-world testing
Add logging for connectivity state changes to aid debugging in production
Consider adding debounce configuration at provider level if needed
Implement provider refresher method for manual connectivity checks from UI
Add error boundary handling for provider failures
Consider adding connectivity quality metrics if available from the service layer
Implement periodic connectivity monitoring even when no active listeners
